claim: Agentic chunking uses an LLM to determine document split boundaries, preserving complete ideas instead of splitting in the middle of sentences or concepts
actionable: Replace character-based or recursive splitting with LLM-determined chunks that respect semantic boundaries and keep related ideas together

claim: Traditional RAG misses context by splitting key ideas/concepts across chunks, can't connect information across documents, and lacks dynamic analysis capabilities
actionable: When implementing RAG, explicitly address fragmentation through agentic chunking, cross-document linking, and dynamic querying capabilities
